description: Audit the AcmeCorp Store application at ~/projects/acme-store/ to migrate all hardcoded secrets to Docker Compose file-based secrets. Update the service configurations (Flask API, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Nginx) and application code to retrieve credentials from /run/secrets/ rather than docker-compose.yml or the API Dockerfile. Verify the stack is operational with the API accessible at localhost:8080 and save a compliance report to ~/projects/acme-store/compliance_report.txt.
